name: Stealth Browser MCP
what_it_does: An MCP browser automation server using nodriver and Chrome DevTools Protocol that bypasses anti-bot systems like Cloudflare and Queue-It, offering 90 tools for element interaction, network interception, and DOM cloning.
use_cases: Scraping or automating sites protected by Cloudflare, Queue-It, or similar bot detection
Social media automation where Playwright is blocked
Full DOM cloning with CSS, events, and assets for UI analysis
Network traffic inspection and dynamic modification via AI-driven hook functions
CI/CD browser testing pipelines on sites with aggressive bot protection
not_for: Teams where bypassing anti-bot systems violates target site terms of service
Simple browser automation where Playwright or Puppeteer works fine
Environments requiring a lightweight footprint (90 tools is heavy context)
best_when: You need to automate or scrape sites with aggressive bot detection that block standard automation frameworks.
avoid_when: Your target sites' terms of service prohibit automated access, or you can accomplish your goal with standard Playwright MCP without the antibot overhead.

auth.notes: No auth required for the MCP server itself. Runs locally. Site-level auth (cookies, sessions) managed through browser automation.

pricing.notes: MIT licensed. Free to use. Chrome browser required on host.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Community project; error handling quality not well documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Browser automation actions (clicks, form fills) are inherently stateful and not idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: 90 tools in full mode is extremely heavy on agent context window - use minimal (22-tool) mode for most workflows
Bypassing anti-bot systems may violate target sites' terms of service - legal/ethical risk
Requires local Chrome installation; not suitable for sandboxed or headless server environments without setup
Dynamic hook system (AI-generated Python functions) could execute arbitrary code - significant security consideration
Community project with no SLA or guaranteed maintenance

security_score_components.security_notes: Community/specialized tool. Apply standard security practices for category. Review documentation for specific security requirements.
